items.text: I enjoy exploring unusual ideas just for curiosity.
I like learning topics outside my daily work.
Art and beauty rarely hold my attention.
I often imagine alternatives before choosing a plan.
I ask many questions when I face something new.
I find most creative work overrated.
I enjoy abstract thinking, even without immediate use.
I avoid ideas that challenge my usual beliefs.
I notice subtle details in music, design, or language.
I read or watch material that broadens my perspective.
I prefer routines over trying unfamiliar approaches.
Creative expression feels pointless to me.
I seek out viewpoints that differ from mine.
I enjoy connecting distant ideas into new concepts.
I rarely care about style or atmosphere.
People can count on me to finish what I start.
My space and schedule are usually disorganized.
I keep working even when tasks get tedious.
I plan my day before jumping into tasks.
I delay important work until pressure forces me.
I check details to prevent avoidable mistakes.
I follow through on long-term goals consistently.
I find routines too restrictive to maintain.
I arrive prepared for meetings or commitments.
I often act first and plan later.
I keep track of deadlines with a system.
I frequently miss small but important obligations.
I can resist distractions when I must focus.
I prefer clear structure over last-minute improvisation.
I leave tasks half-done more than I should.
I feel energized after social interaction.
I avoid social gatherings whenever I can.
I speak up quickly when I have an opinion.
I hesitate to lead when a group needs direction.
I prefer a fast-paced day over a slow one.
I start conversations easily with new people.
I usually choose low-energy activities.
I am comfortable taking initiative in groups.
I enjoy being around people most days.
I keep my views to myself even when relevant.
I like keeping multiple activities going.
Extended social time drains me quickly.
I am drawn to stimulating environments.
I can comfortably direct a discussion.
I prefer to stay in the background socially.
I try to understand others before judging them.
I look for compromise during disagreements.
Most people would exploit you if given a chance.
I notice when someone around me is distressed.
I enjoy winning arguments more than solving problems.
I usually assume good intentions first.
I stay respectful even in conflict.
Other people's feelings are mostly their own problem.
I forgive mistakes when someone acts in good faith.
I push my way through when I want something.
I can see both sides of most conflicts.
I am suspicious of others by default.
I value team success over personal credit.
I adjust my tone when someone seems hurt.
Kindness is usually a weakness.
I worry about things that might go wrong.
I stay calm under pressure most of the time.
My mood can shift quickly during stressful days.
I recover quickly after setbacks.
Small hassles can feel overwhelming to me.
I often replay mistakes in my mind.
I remain emotionally steady across difficult situations.
I feel tense before important events.
Criticism affects me for a long time.
I rarely dwell on uncertain outcomes.
I get rattled when plans change suddenly.
I can let go of frustration quickly.
I anticipate negative outcomes even in ordinary situations.
I feel physically tense when stressed.
My emotions are stable from day to day.
